title: Wait node gets stuck due to invalid token error
symptom: The wait node in the workflow becomes unresponsive, and the error 'INVALID TOKEN' is displayed when a webhook call fails.
applies_when: Webhook call fails with invalid token
not_this_if: Error does not occur during webhook execution
root_cause: The invalid token error occurs because the URL used in the webhook call is incorrectly formatted, leading to a failure in the token validation process. This can cause the wait node to hang indefinitely as it waits for a response that will never come.
fix_steps: Open the Teams adaptive card configuration
agent_instruction: Update the URL in the Teams adaptive card configuration to use '&' instead of '?' for the decision parameter.
